caption: A man wearing a black hooded jacket over a grey shirt is positioned in a recording studio against a dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam wall. He is wearing large black over-ear headphones and is speaking into a professional condenser microphone attached to a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man's facial expressions shift as he speaks; he begins with his eyes open, looks slightly upward and closes his eyes in the subsequent frames, and briefly raises his left hand with a ring on his finger in the second frame. The camera remains in a steady close-up shot, focusing on the man from the chest up. No on-screen text or logos are visible. The scene transitions smoothly as the man continues his delivery, with the lighting and background remaining constant.
